episodes.title: Don't hate the replicator, hate the game
episodes.summary:
• The world of science has been stuck in an existential crisis over whether we actually know the things we thought we knew
• Re-running an old study today doesn't always yield the same result
• Same with re-enacting old experiments
• Collectively, this is known as the “replication crisis
